message:
feat(tui): add 6 TUI Inspector profiles for new tui-upgrade features [bd-jynig]

Created profiles for capturing visual regressions on new TUI components:
- ntm-context-progress: enhanced context progress bars
- ntm-table-view: bubbles/table pane list for Split+ tiers
- ntm-spawn-wizard: huh-powered spawn wizard overlay
- ntm-sparkline-status: status bar sparkline trends
- ntm-scroll-indicators: viewport scroll indicators
- ntm-toast-stacking: toast stacking with dismiss animation

Profiles stored at /dp/tui_inspector/profiles/.
Updated test expectations in vhs_tapes_test.go.

This unblocks bd-rpa8o (full regression suite).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -97,6 +97,13 @@ func TestTUIInspectorProfilesExist(t *testing.T) {
 	expected := []string{
 		"ntm-toast-animation.env",
 		"ntm-fuzzy-filter.env",
+		// bd-jynig: TUI Inspector capture profiles for new tui-upgrade features
+		"ntm-context-progress.env",
+		"ntm-table-view.env",
+		"ntm-spawn-wizard.env",
+		"ntm-sparkline-status.env",
+		"ntm-scroll-indicators.env",
+		"ntm-toast-stacking.env",
 	}
 	for _, profile := range expected {
 		path := filepath.Join(root, "profiles", profile)
